subject.description: Early-40s man with close-cropped hair, sharp features, wearing a dark slim-fit jacket over a plain tee. Leaning slightly forward, elbows on table.
subject.action: Pointing at a screen with one finger while looking across the table at someone off-frame. Mouth slightly open — mid-sentence, making a point. Eyebrows raised on one side — the 'you see what I mean?' expression. Eyes sharp and direct.

setting.location: Modern conference room, one large screen on the wall showing a workflow diagram softly blurred. Two other people visible as blurred shapes across the table. Glass water bottle and a notebook visible in foreground.
setting.time_of_day: Midday — bright even ambient light, no harsh shadows.

composition.camera_angle: Eye-level, slight high angle from across the table
composition.framing: Full medium shot. Crown with headspace at top. Cut at hip. Subject left of center, pointing right toward screen. Never cut in flesh.

lighting.type: Bright even ambient conference room light. No dramatic shadows. Clean and real.
lighting.color_grading: Cinematic teal-orange grade — neutral midday tones with teal pushed into background shadows. Skin warm and protected.

mood: Persuasive clarity — the moment someone explains something they genuinely believe and expects the other person to finally get it.
aesthetic_style: Shot on Sony A7 with 80mm lens. Cinematic teal-orange color grade. Real conference room environment. Skin pores visible. Subject caught mid-gesture, mid-sentence, NOT posed. Looks like a still from a prestige documentary or drama series.
